text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Thursday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, December 05. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. He is doing so well. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Calculating some savings estimates. First United Mortgage offered 5.75% with zero points. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Refinancing is a great leverage point. A rate of 5.75% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Staying active is key. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That is a common bottleneck. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, I'm reviewing the patient onboarding specs for Vertex Health. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Reviewing our household budget today. First United Mortgage offered 5.8% with zero points. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Refinancing is a great leverage point. A rate of 5.8% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Staying active is key. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Let's break this down. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Ethan did great with his school homework. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
